scope: Active runtime topology, port ownership, process-start intent, restart authority boundaries and validation rules for TEST MCP. This file is an authority map, not a deployment log.

public_3009.current_process_source: may be replaced independently from oauth21_3008; do not use TESTS_MCP runtime_status as validation for this runtime

oauth21_3008.live_load_status: repo_commits_may_not_be_live_until oauth21_3008 is restarted through approved authority

restart_authority.expected_model: file-triggered or supervisor-mediated restart preserving original runtime topology and startup arguments
restart_authority.known_missing_authority: previous file-triggered restart mechanism is not present in active repo authority as of this audit
forbidden_operations: treating public_3009 restart as oauth21_3008 live-load validation
claiming Stage14.5 OAuth21 live-load from TESTS_MCP status without an approved oauth21_3008 restart
allowed_until_restored: operator-approved creation of explicit restart authority
restart_authority.current_live_status: operator reported successful oauth21_3008 migration to scripts/server.ps1 supervisor; controlled restart trigger code 42 tested successfully and healthz remained available after restart

cross_runtime_forbidden: restart 3009 plus TESTS_MCP 3008 status must not be described as one live validation

minimum_output: keep 3008 started through scripts/server.ps1 or scripts/server.sh
use scripts/request-restart.js or trigger file for controlled restart
do not use generic port-kill restart
re-run healthz and authenticated runtime status after future live restart changes

sessionless_ready_review.notes: Root spec reviewed for sessionless-ready workflow posture; stable connector route remains unchanged and sessionless activation/migration remain separate explicit operator stages.
